summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sistema Maestro V1 platform. Backend APIs working at 93.3% success rate. Frontend UI and integration testing successful. All major features from rebranding (CERVACO to Sistema Maestro) are functional including real URL analysis, AI project classification, and Stripe billing integration.

integration_issues.issue: Blueprint generation button not consistently found during flow testing

passed_tests: Home page loads with Sistema Maestro branding
Cookie banner appears on first visit and can be accepted
Dashboard displays after login with user stats
Create project with TEXT input - AI analysis working
Create project with URL input (https://stripe.com) - real URL scraping working
Projects are saved and listed in dashboard (4 projects found)
Opportunities module shows content (5 opportunity cards)
Billing page shows all plans (Gratis €0, Blueprint €29, Sistema €79, Premium €199)
Navigation between all dashboard sections works
Backend API authentication flow (login, get user, logout)
Backend billing and user stats endpoints
